name: ChainStream
description: AI-native on-chain big data infrastructure. Real-time trading data, token analytics, wallet PnL, and quantitative trading across BSC, Base, Solana.

x402.description: Pay-per-query via x402 protocol. No account needed. Send request without payment to receive HTTP 402 with pricing, then sign and retry with X-Payment header.

skills.name: Token Analytics
skills.description: Search tokens, get price/volume/holders/K-line data across multiple chains
examples: What is the current price of PUMP on Solana?
Show me top holders of token X

skills.name: Wallet Profiling
skills.description: Portfolio overview, PnL analysis, trade history for any wallet address
examples: What is the PnL of wallet 0x...?

skills.name: Real-time Data Streams
skills.description: Subscribe to live trade feeds, price updates, and whale alerts

skills.name: Quantitative Trading
skills.description: Strategy generation, backtesting, and execution on DEXes
